anti_claim: These copied route rows preserve public route commands and route metadata; they do not prove live route freshness, source authority, release readiness, provider access, or private session state.

rows.title: Entry control packet
rows.use_when: Canonical cold-agent first move for any task: compile one selected lane, next legal action, banned routes, proof, and drilldown/debug policy before opening context-pack, kind-atlas, option-surface rows, docs-route, skill-find, paper-module, or source evidence.

route_targets.label: Live Projections Must Be Entry Routes

card.route_hint: Canonical cold-agent first move for any task: compile one selected lane, next legal action, banned routes, proof, and drilldown/debug policy before opening context-pack, kind-atlas, option-surface rows, docs-route, skill-find, paper-module, or source evidence.

rows.title: Frontend capability discovery

card.route_hint: Any frontend task: UI polish, dashboard clarity, layout, interaction design, prototype, visual hierarchy, accessibility, a11y, keyboard usability, screen reader, ARIA, semantic HTML, contrast, WCAG, LCP, INP, CLS, layout shift, Core Web Vitals, hydration, browser console errors, network debugging, devtools, screenshot, visual verification, before/after diff, design system handoff, UX copy, design critique, design exploration, React page audit, React component review, hi-fi prototype, mobile app mockup, motion demo, anti-AI-slop visual polish.

rows.title: Type B to Type A continuation handoff
rows.route_command: ./repo-python kernel.py --entry "type b to type a continuation handoff <task>" --context-budget 12000
rows.fallback_command: ./repo-python kernel.py --context-pack "type b to type a continuation handoff <task>" --context-budget 12000
rows.freshness_command: ./repo-python kernel.py --navigation-metabolism "type b to type a continuation handoff" --context-budget 12000
rows.use_when: The operator asks the current Type A repo agent to classify Type A/B, ask Type B, or consume a full Type B/bridge/operator-HUD response, continuation delta, final-call decision memo, or paste-ready Type A continuation prompt and expects the current Type A repo agent to execute or verify the directed continuation rather than classify the paste by incidental public/dissemination/prior-art terms.
